description_long: A loosely clustered bouquet of pale yellow roses is depicted, with several blooms at varying stages of openness. The petals are soft, rounded, and layered, forming classic rose shapes with subtle gradations of cream and yellow. The green stems are visible, supporting the flowers and accompanied by a few broad, dark green leaves. Some petals and leaves appear slightly wilted or irregular, adding a naturalistic touch. The bouquet is incomplete in places, with gaps and missing sections, giving it a fragmented appearance. The overall impression is of a delicate, hand-held arrangement suitable for decorative or ceremonial use in an urban park or garden.
description: A loosely clustered bouquet of pale yellow roses with green stems and broad leaves, showing natural variation and some missing sections.
description_view_0: This view highlights the tops of several pale yellow rose blooms, with green stems and leaves partially visible beneath.
description_view_1: The bouquet is seen more from the side, revealing the arrangement of the roses and the supporting stems, with more leaves visible.
description_view_2: A top-down angle shows the overlapping petals and the spread of the leaves, with some gaps in the bouquet structure.
description_view_3: The rear of the bouquet is visible, showing more of the stems and the underside of the leaves, with some petals appearing wilted or fragmented.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled, overlapping pattern typical of roses, with multiple concentric layers forming a rounded, symmetrical bloom.
